summary: Iteration 97: Testing NEW Studio Features - Language selection, Visual style selection, Character avatar persistence, Per-scene retry/edit buttons. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new UI elements including Language selector (PT/EN/ES), Visual Style selector (Animation/Cartoon/Anime/Realistic/Watercolor), per-scene Regenerar/Editar buttons in Step 3 and Step 4, and failed scenes summary with Regenerar buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: studio.py: StudioProject model has language field with default 'pt' and visual_style field with default 'animation'
studio.py: STYLE_PROMPTS mapping defines 5 visual styles: animation, cartoon, anime, realistic, watercolor
studio.py: Sora 2 retry logic has max_retries = 3 with exponential backoff
studio.py: FFmpeg compression implemented with CRF 28/32 for video concatenation
studio.py: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/save-character-avatars persists character_avatars to project
studio.py: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/update-scene updates scene data (title, description, dialogue, emotion, camera, transition)
studio.py: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/regenerate-scene starts single scene regeneration with optional custom_prompt
studio.py: GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status returns character_avatars, visual_style, language fields
DirectedStudio.jsx: Language selector (data-testid='project-language-select') with PT/EN/ES options
DirectedStudio.jsx: Visual Style selector (data-testid='project-visual-style-select') with 5 style options
DirectedStudio.jsx: Per-scene Regenerar/Editar buttons in Step 3 (data-testid='regen-scene-{n}', 'edit-scene-{n}')
DirectedStudio.jsx: Per-scene Refazer/Editar buttons in Step 4 (data-testid='result-regen-{n}', 'result-edit-{n}')
DirectedStudio.jsx: Failed scenes summary with Regenerar buttons (data-testid='failed-regen-{n}')
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing projects for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new studio features tested and working: Language selector (PT/EN/ES), Visual Style selector (5 options), Character avatar persistence, Per-scene retry/edit buttons. DirectedStudio is accessed via: Login -> /marketing/studio -> Click 'Estudio' campaign type. Project list shows 41 projects. Per-scene buttons appear in Step 3 (Production) and Step 4 (Results) views. Failed scenes summary shows at bottom of Step 4 with individual Regenerar buttons.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/update-sc: PASS - Endpoint exists and accepts scene data
backend_api_tests.POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/regenerat: PASS - Endpoint exists and starts regeneration
backend_api_tests.FFmpeg compression: PASS - Code review verified CRF compression
